title: Exemption of certificates from taxation; acceptability as security
doc_html:
§3536.  Exemption of certificates from taxation; acceptability as security

All certificates issued under the provisions of this Sub-part shall be exempt from taxation.  They shall be acceptable as security for any deposit of public funds.

Acts 1952, No. 379, §16.
